revision.text: [http://{{{1|en.wikimedia.org}}} {{{2|}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.

[http://{{{1|en.wikimedia.org}}} {{{2|}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.[http://ask it {{{2|}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.

[http://{{{1|en.wikipedia.org}}} {{{2|}}}] {{plainlink|en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User_talk:The_editor1&action=edit|2=ask it}} This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.

[http://{{{url|en.wikipedia.org}}} {{{name|}}}] {{plainlink| url=en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Template:Plainlink&action=edit| name=ask it}} This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.

[http://{{{url|en.wikipedia.org}}} {{{name|}}}] {{plainlink| url=en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Template:Plainlink&action=edit| name=ask it }} This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.
[http://{{{url|en.wikipedia.org}}} {{{name|}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.
[http://{{{url|en.wikipedia.org}}} {{{name|}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.
[http://{{{url|en.wikipedia.org}}} {{{name|}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.
[{{{url|en.wikipedia.org}}} {{{name|}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.
[{{{url|http://en.wikipedia.org}}} {{{name|}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]in the way.
[{{{1|http://en.wikipedia.org}}} {{qif|test={{{2|}}}|then={{{2|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way.
[{{{1|''link''}}} {{qif|test={{{2|}}}|then={{{2|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way.
[{{{url}}} {{qif|test={{{2|}}}|then={{{2|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way.
[{{{url}}} {{qif|test={{{1|}}}|then={{{1|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way.
[{{{url|''WEB Site name''}}} {{qif|test={{{1|}}}|then={{{1|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way.
[{{{url|''WEB Site name''}}} {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way.

[{{{url|''WEB Site name''}}} {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way. [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

[{{{1|}}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way. [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

[{{{1|}}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way. [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

[{{{1|}}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way. It formats it like this: {{plainlink|http://en.wikipedia.org|wikipedia}} [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: I believe this will fix the transclusion problem with the {{plainlink}} template
revision.text: [{{{1}}}| {{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way. It formats it like this: {{plainlink|http://en.wikipedia.org|wikipedia}} [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

[{{{1}}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}||{{{2}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way. It formats it like this: {{plainlink|http://en.wikipedia.org|wikipedia}} [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

[{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}||{{{2}}}}}] This template will alow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way. It formats it like this: {{plainlink|http://en.wikipedia.org|wikipedia}} [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Let's rv for now; too many templates are being affected by this problem

revision.comment: Something is messing up the step #3 log link at [[Wikipedia:Articles_for_deletion#How_to_list_pages_for_deletion]]
revision.text: [{{{url|''WEB Site name''}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}] {{protected template}} This template will allow you to link to a site with out having that little[http://en.wikipedia.org  ]  in the way. [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: making this compatible with how plainlinks worked, since that template got redirected w/o warning...
simply the fix - this should now be compatible with how plainlinks worked.
+ parameter synonyms, per talk page request
prevent addition of extra space when second param is blank or absent
Undid revision 745298400 by [[Special:Contributions/Redrose64|Redrose64]] ([[User talk:Redrose64|talk]]) - revert requested on talk
another try at eliminating the extra space

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Plain link]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: Allowing template editors ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Plain link]]": Used in [[Template:No article text]] - on [[WP:CASC]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23043689808|manual triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
